channel.title: Posts on Daniels page
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Daniels page

item.title: SC - Vogel and Reichenstein
item.description: Short comments on two papers: Vogel (2017): Stochastic watershed models for hydrologic risk management This paper provides a - perhaps too enthusiastic - overview of the potential uses of stochastic watershed models (for hydrological risk management). It goes trough some of history and explains why they are seemingly underused today. It’s a good read, despite being a bit lengthy. It seemed to be that the information could be condensed more and poured into a well rounded opinion peace.
